attributes.action: Ban AI apps using so much water or banning them all together to save our planet
attributes.additional_details: Because I believe that the animals and the younger generations are ignored more than people realise when it comes to our planets future. The sheer amount of water used unnecessarily on apps is astonishing. I really believe this is the first turning point to reversing our tracks on global warming and generally could make the planet a better place. After all someone has to speak for the polar bears suffering.
attributes.background: I would like the government to ban the usage of individual ai apps like chat got and unnecessary ai usage on apps (eg Snapchat ai). The water that it uses to cool the machines is rapidly killing the planet.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Ban all use of AI in the UK" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754836

You may also be interested in these petitions: 

"Ban personal use of AI and require AI watermarks" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747429

"Require browsers & social media to include AI off switch for UK residents" 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761191
